problem_statement: Component Harness runtime authority promotion needs a local read-model evidence queue and a non-accepting submission intake so missing evidence can be requested and submitted refs can be observed without granting execution, acceptance, authority, promotion, or terminal closure.
success_criteria: derive deterministic component_evidence_request_queue records from bundle compiler and claim firewall sources
derive deterministic component_evidence_submission_intake records from the request queue
record request slots as request-only AwaitingEvidence with Unknown proof state
record submitted refs as observations only and never as accepted or rejected evidence
register both schemas in the protocol manifest and workspace governance preflight
bind both surfaces into the proof coverage matrix as proven read-model/audit-chain surfaces
update the workspace preflight receipt schema and example to preserve canonical check order
non_goals: do not execute, dispatch, mutate, call connectors, or claim terminal closure
do not add runtime endpoint registration
constraints: request queue and submission intake are deterministic local read models
unsafe source authority drift must fail closed with explicit causal context
submitted refs remain unverified until a separate governed verifier exists
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved because no Amharic, Ge'ez, Mfidel, or Ethiopian script processing is introduced
evidence_required: workspace governance preflight receipt contract update
